title: Croaker
description: A horror mod that adds the croaker, also known as the frog man monster
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/okgbD0Er74s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



The Croaker is a terrifying half Frog half man monster that roams the land. If the Croaker is near by, you will hear the monster breathing and calling. Now this monster can jump, climb, and will chase you down!

There is a config command /croakerconfig that allows you to change spawning, speed, health, and other abilities. (spawn time 1 second = 20)

Do not use Entity Culling with Croaker. There is an issue that causes Croaker to be Invisible. This is caused by the custom dynamic swimming ability that has not been seen before

Requires GeckoLib
